description: Style NoteOne of the largest sportswear Brands in the world lotto certainly knows how to create products that score high on style as well as quality. The fabric upper keeps your feet fresh all day, while the patterned outsole provides superior grip on any terrain.Product DetailsBlue canvas upper for easy maintenance and durabilityCarbon rubber toe box for enhanced protection of the upper footLong canvas tongue for added comfort and snug FitLace-ups through metal eyelets for snug fit and durabilityHigh ankle folded over and buttoned for style( black)Print at lateral sideFoam insole for high energy return and cushioningVulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and tractionMulti-directional pattern on the forefoot and heel, with embossed brand namePivot points below the forefoot area for flexible movementMaterial and CareCanvas, rubberWipe with damp cloth to remove dirt
